title: Valorant Kill Effect
description: Valorant Kill Effect is a Minecraft Fabric mod that plays a Valorant-style kill animation whenever you get a kill.
body:
Valorant Kill Effect adds the thrill of Valorant-style kill notifications to Minecraft. Whenever you defeat a player or mob, a Valorant kill banner appears on your screen and a Valorant kill sound effect plays, providing an exciting visual and audio cue for every kill.

The mod tracks kill streaks, showing different banners and sounds as your streak grows, giving you satisfying feedback for consecutive kills and adding extra excitement to your gameplay.

It works automatically for all kills, enhancing PvP and general combat encounters without requiring any configuration, making every battle feel dynamic and stylish.
